name: Stone Bowl
description: Patrons, show some love...

name: Savings Jar
description: Watch your savings grow!

name: Piggy Bank
description: The more you save, the fatter he gets!

name: Cash Register
description: You'll be counting cash till your hand cramps

name: Reverie Register
description: I hear it can scan QR codes!

name: Pumpkin Tip Desk
description: Quickly take away the cod or they'll be eaten by the jack-o'-lantern.

name: Chimney Counter
description: Seems like it's bottomless.

name: Abacus Counter
description: This abacus has weathered many storms.

name: Seashell Counter
description: The pearl in the seashell has been replaced by cod.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Cod under the Sun
description: It is said that excess cod will be taken away by a hot air balloon if it's not collected on time.

name: Cashier Cart
description: Keep your balance at all times.
specialRequirements: Could be won in the Bread Maker during Anniversary Event 2020

name: Celestial Scales
description: Absolute justice!

name: Precious Collection
description: Each and every cod deserves to be treasured.

name: Ghost Treasure Chest
description: The ghost cries loudly, 'This is my cod! Mine!'

name: Treasure Pot
description: The best method to attract wealth.

name: Ding Dong Counter
description: The sound of the chime is so therapeutic.

name: Treasure Cashier
description: We only accept treasures!

name: Nocturnal Tip Desk
description: Rests in the day, collects money at night.

name: Ice Crystal Tip Desk
description: A mysterious little tune plays when a tip is received.

name: Twisted Honeypot
description: The growing vines carry the honeypot higher and higher.

name: Dozing Dragon Treasure Trove
description: Hands off the cod! Unless you want a dragonling who got up on the wrong side of bed on your back.

name: Delicious Baskets of Bread
description: Take some of the delicious bread with you!

name: Magical Stars Counter
description: The little mouse will thank you if you put some cod inside.

name: Jade Dragon's Treasure Cabinet
description: The tiny dragon stores all of its precious treasures here.
specialRequirements: Sold During Chinese New Year Event

name: Mysterious Droplets
description: Every drop is precious.
specialRequirements: Originally obtained from Deep-sea Ballad event

name: Aqua Tip Desk
description: Is it only time who likes the 'clickety-clack' sounds that the buttons on a cash register makes?

name: Clairvoyant Tip Desk
description: I can see the future. A windfall is coming your way.

name: Platform Tip Desk
description: Did this journey meet your expectations?

name: Festive Lantern Tip Desk
description: You can admire this exquisite lantern while you're tipping.
specialRequirements: Sold During Chinese New Year Event

name: Horizon Receiver
description: Signals received from across the cosmos have dyed the cod in the colors of the rainbow!

name: Birdy Jack-in-the-box
description: That's right, the kind birdy brought you an unexpected windfall.

name: Abundant Wings
description: Each feather is imbued with the magic of abundance.

name: Small Stump
description: A cozy table

name: Elegant Table
description: An elegant, impressive round table

name: Mousse Tip Desk
description: The cod placed inside it smell so fragrant!

name: Small Table
description: An ordinary wooden table

name: VIP Table
description: A table for guests of honor

name: Blue Dream
description: Blue Dream Table

name: Mushroom Table
description: Coexist with nature.

name: Spiderwebbed Table
description: An ancient table. You can smell the dust on it.

name: Jack-o'-lantern
description: A must-have for Halloween.

name: Concealing Table
description: There's an unidentified animal hidden underneath the table cloth.

name: Mirrored Table
description: With a little waxing, you'll be able to see your reflection from the table.

name: Mahjong Table
description: In reality, nobody will use it to play mahjong.

name: Sailor Table
description: Classic blue and white stripes. It is said that everyone dreamed of becoming a sailor when they were young.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Chocolate Dream
description: Does other food taste better when you eat in there?

name: Strawberry Candy Table
description: Sweet and filled with the scent of strawberries.

name: Christmas Round Table
description: A red checkered tablecloth is a good match for Christmas!

name: Divination Table
description: Bought from the Divination Shop. It has magic that makes food more tasty.

name: Mysterious Iron Trunk
description: If you don't open it, you'll never know what's inside...

name: Tulip Table
description: Iron the tablecloth flat and let's start the party!

name: Flower Field Stroll
description: You feel as though you're surrounded by elegant flowering shrubs.

name: Castle Table
description: Roses silently creep around the table's legs.

name: Snowflake Table
description: An ice table that is warmed up using magic. It isn't as cold as it looks.

name: Wintry Hills Stone Table
description: Drink to your heart's content and cherish these joyful moments of reunion, for they are rare and precious.

name: Summer Excursion
description: Pack your bags! We're going on a self-improvement journey!

name: Verdant Murmurs
description: The grass rustling in the breeze whispers a soft welcome to you.

name: Milky Toast
description: Food tastes even better when you are immersed in a rich milky aroma.

name: Romance Project
description: Its heart secretly yearns to meet you.

name: Violet Rhapsody
description: The clash of metal and sweethearts will bring you an experience unlike any other.

name: Seashell Table
description: Watch out-the seashell might sneakily chomp on the dishes that you put on this table!

name: Butter Chocolate Table
description: I won't become plump if I have a few mouthfuls of dessert, right?

name: Happy Round Table
description: The ultimate happy indulgence: getting to try delicious food!

name: Delicious Gingerbread Table
description: Freshly baked from the oven!

name: Sounds of Ancient Rhyme
description: The echoes from even a gentle rap will sound far and wide.

name: Rainbow Signal
description: One day, a transmission from beyond the sky will appear alongside a rainbow.

name: Mini Lace Table
description: If you look carefully, you'll discover that the lace is decorated with scattered florets.

name: Zephyr Wings
description: A gentle wind occasionally blows past.

name: Velvety Cake Table
description: Is the cream lining the table actually edible? *Munching sounds*

description: An ordinary wooden table

description: A table for guests of honor

description: Is the cream lining the table actually edible? *Munching sounds*

name: Wild Fern
description: Picked from the neighbor's garden

name: Houseplant
description: The standard houseplant

name: Cactus
description: Can live a long time, even without water

name: Lux Shade
description: The best match for big events

name: Mushroom Forest
description: Mushroom Forest

name: Tree of Despair
description: I hear that there's a famous person buried underneath this tree.

name: Christmas Tree
description: Hung full of presents. Is there anything you wish for?

name: Rock Garden
description: All tycoons like rock gardens. There's even a little frog on top!

name: Tropical Coconut
description: Eggy looks forward to the ripening of the coconuts on the trees.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Botanical Ferris Wheel
description: Gumi said it's an amazing tool to grow green plants.

name: Sweet and Sour Lemon Tree
description: You and me under the lemon tree.

name: Greenhouse Rose
description: The stars guard over the delicate roses.

name: Lightbulb Tree
description: Every lightbulb holds a story.

name: Fragrant Screen
description: Everyone says that it's relaxing over here.

name: Green Party Tree
description: Fluffy, soft, and very comfortable to touch.

name: Artistic Vine
description: Full of vitality!

name: Rose Blessing
description: Accept the luck of the flowers.

name: Exquisite Christmas Tree
description: A sapling protected by magic stars. It will never ever wither.

name: Floral Cat Tree
description: No cat will want to leave this fully-crocheted cat tree once they've climbed onto it.

name: Blossoming Mirror
description: Nobody knows where the flowers growing out of the mirror came from, nor where the path into the mirror leads to.

name: Memory Door
description: In the past, many customers entered this door expecting something delicious.

name: Butterfly Appeal
description: Delicately balanced but doesn't fall no matter what.

name: Snowy Landscape
description: Feel the spirit of winter amid this snowy landscape.

name: Blue Coral Tree
description: There seem to be tiny creatures secretly observing us.

name: Melodious Piano
description: Flowers that listen to the soothing melodies of a piano bloom even more vibrantly.

name: Dreams Aloft
description: Do you see your fantasy here?

name: Birdie Tree House
description: It houses a large family.

name: Overhanging Asiatic Apples
description: Quietly displays the sights of spring atop the eaves.

name: Photon Reentry Capsule
description: Strange plants are growing around the long-unused reentry capsule.

name: Parrot's Ode to Joy
description: Fall asleep amid floral aromas and the chirping of birds. Sweet dreams!

name: Rose Guardian
description: It looks after the beautiful roses with care.

name: Sweet Tour
description: Like a merry-go-round, it's both sweet and dreamy.

name: Fruit Platter
description: Full of seasonal fruits!

name: Afternoon Tea Table
description: Have some tea and cakes!

name: Lavish Cakes
description: A case full of enticing cakes

name: Patisserie Counter
description: All the gourmet sweets you'll ever need

name: Candy Hearts Cabinet
description: A favorite of nobles.

name: Monster Dessert
description: A necessary dessert-making tool for Halloween.

name: Heartwarming Winter
description: A brilliant campfire lighting up the coming days of the new year.

name: Pastry Table
description: Loaded up with many traditional Chinese pastries.

name: Sea Breeze Dessert
description: Donuts and cupcakes are the bestsellers.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Cooling Summer
description: Summer's a little warm, let's cool it down.

name: Fruit Cart
description: A magical meeting of fruits and desserts.

name: Delicious Magic
description: Please remember the spell to make it delicious: Delectamenti!

name: Mechanical Heart
description: The parts on top are edible!

name: Graceful Table
description: The bold design leads to whimsical grace.

name: Sweet Dreams
description: Childhood dreams are always filled with a sweet aroma.

name: Energetic Sweetness
description: The sweetness fills you with lots of energy.

name: Hues of Sweetness
description: Sweetness comes in many different forms!

name: Midnight Invitation
description: Do cakes taste better underneath the moonlight?

name: Snow-white Fluffy Cabinet
description: Could more candy be hiding underneath the snow?

name: Sprout Counter
description: The little seeds of hope planted here will surely sprout in the future.

name: Hypnotic Sigh
description: The aroma diffuser on the table promotes sleep.

name: Fluffy Bread Counter
description: Bite into the soft and aromatic bread that is freshly baked from the oven.

name: Delicious Trap
description: Don't eat this jelly! Or... or your tongue will turn green!

name: Fragrant Ink
description: The ink that is grounded from this inkstone has a sweet fragrance reminiscent of honey.

name: Sweet Cascade
description: The power of sweetness surges forth!

name: Macaron Memories
description: When I first ate a macaron, I still remember the blissful taste of sweetness that blossomed from the tip of my tongue.

name: Saccharine Carnival
description: Time to serve up the delectable desserts!

name: Tasty Carriage
description: Traveling toward you with all kinds of delicious treats.

name: Donut Peach Feast
description: Will I live longer if I munch on a peach?

name: Cotton Candy Rocket
description: Did the rocket just fly through a patch of cloud or cotton candy?

name: Honey Floral Realm
description: Are these actual flowers or decor? Take a bite and find out!

name: Sweet Fairytales
description: I wonder which fairytale these sweets are inspired by?

name: Whipped Cream Dessert Bar
description: Today's featured dessert is a delicious crepes!

name: Green Grass
description: Freshly plucked from the neighbor's yard!

name: Blanket
description: Makes your paws feel itchy

name: Cute Fleece
description: A soft fleece blanket

name: Oval Mat
description: Only VIP paws can step on me!

name: Cozy Round Rug
description: Gives off a cozy feeling.

name: Poker Rug
description: The mouse brought this back from Las Vegas.

name: Fur Carpet
description: A carpet made from the fur of an unknown animal.

name: Carpet of Wealth
description: Placing a mahjong table on top of this can help boost one's fortunes.

name: Sailor Mat
description: Looks rather light and soft.
series: Of Coconut Trees and the Sea Breeze

name: Paw Prints and Chocolate
description: Gumi's paw prints are on the chocolate.

name: Orange Mat
description: You can still smell the faint scent of orange.

name: Knitted Carpet
description: Feels soft under your feet. Very comfortable.

name: Map Mat
description: It's a treasure map, so don't let the others find out!

name: Old Sweater Mat
description: A mat hand-made by Granny. It's got a very classic design.

name: Octagonal Mat
description: Spins instantly. Perfect for a beginner.

name: Candy Tales
description: Spun with sugar thread!

name: Secret Language of Flowers
description: It represents what I want to tell you.

name: Soft Palette
description: Use colors to express the intricacies of emotion.

name: Spiderweb Carpet
description: The designer was clearly inspired by spiderwebs.

name: Bell Rug
description: The bell motif has been sewn by hand.

name: Scholarly Aura
description: Books are the legacies of knowledge.

name: Stump Carpet
description: A new tree ring appears with every passing year.

name: Musing Mirror
description: Shh, don't stare into it for too long. It may just pull you to the other side.

name: Aromatic Cheese Carpet
description: It gives off a strong fragrance of cheese.

name: Funny Face Carpet
description: I made this myself in the DIY workshop. It feels great to the touch.

name: Ocean Blue Woolen Rug
description: Made using all-natural dyes.

name: Bone Puppy
